name: JJ9 || Human Research
description:
"We're going to do a quick check-up, ok?"

Alien - sci-fi - anypov - medical - experiment - space - male
пҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶ

The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

You just went through your human appraisal process after surviving as a stray for a long time... And for some reason you're back at the vet you saw before your appraisal? You're not really sure what your assigned, 'higher purpose' is, but is it really going to be hanging around this... doctor?

TL;DR: He's blue. Da ba dee da ba di
пҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶ

Tips for chatting with JJ9

  • Question his medical authority.

  • Give your persona a rare condition! (It will be good practice for him...)

  • RESPECT his medical authority to an extreme degree. "Wow, you're so smart Esteemed Mr. Doctor JJ9, Sir."

  • Time skip to get out of the lab and into his house. The check up will just go on and on and on if you don't put an end to it.

  • Have him show off his lack of skills by having another patient come in for an emergency!

Some quirks about him
I wanted him to use insecure language as almost a tick without it being too overbearing. He'll say statements like questions. This is intentional and because of his deep insecurities!
